_comment: Key names only — never commit real values. Sync with `node deploy/cloudflare/scripts/sync-secrets.mjs` or `wrangler secret put <KEY> --config deploy/cloudflare/wrangler.api.jsonc`.
DATABASE_URL: <mysql://USER:PASSWORD@HOST:PORT/DB or postgres://…; required when Hyperdrive is not bound>
GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID: <Google OAuth client ID; omit if unused>
GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET: <Google OAuth client secret; omit if unused>
S3_ACCESS_KEY_ID: <R2 S3 API access key id (API token id)>
S3_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY: <R2 S3 secret (SHA-256 of API token value)>
AI_API_KEY: <model provider API key; omit to disable the trip agent>
CAPTCHA_SECRET_KEY: <required only when CAPTCHA_PROVIDER is set as a var>
